note: Do not instantiate directly; use itasca.zone module functions.

method_groups.face: face_areas, face_extra, face_find, face_find_normal, face_group, face_group_remove, face_in_group, face_normals, set_face_extra, set_face_group
method_groups.strain: strain, strain_rate, strain_shear_inc, strain_shear_rate, strain_vol_inc, strain_vol_rate
method_groups.stress: set_stress, stress, stress_effective, stress_int, stress_max, stress_min, stress_prin, stress_prin_dir, stress_prin_x, stress_prin_y, stress_prin_z
method_groups.work: set_work_elastic_shear, set_work_elastic_vol, set_work_plastic_shear, set_work_plastic_vol, work_elastic_shear, work_elastic_total, work_elastic_vol, work_plastic_shear, work_plastic_total, work_plastic_vol

methods.name: adjacent_zones
methods.signature: adjacent_zones ( ) → length 6 tuple of Zone objects or None.
methods.description: Return a tuple of the zones adjacent to this zone via a topologically perfect face. If there is no face adjacent to face i the ith element of the tuple will be None.

returns.type: length 6 tuple of Zone objects or None.

methods.name: aspect
methods.description: Get the measure of a zone’s aspect ratio. Values near zero indicate a zone with a large aspect ratio. This is defined as the minimum ratio of smallest to largest edge length among adjacent edges of a zone.

methods.name: condition
methods.description: Get the zone condition number. This is a general value indication how geometrically well formed the zone is. A value of 1.0 indicates a perfect cubical zone. A value of 0.0 indicates an unusable zone.

methods.name: copy_to
methods.description: Copy the zone state information from this zone to the destination zone.

methods.name: create_interface_element
methods.signature: create_interface_element ( face_index: int , interface_name: str ) → int.
methods.description: Create new interface elements attached to the face given by face_index. face_index starts at 0. The newly created interface elements will be added to the interface given by interface_name. If this interface does not exist it will be created. The return value is the number if interface elements created. A value of zero is returned if the face already has an interface.

methods.name: density
methods.description: Get the zone zone density.

methods.name: extra
methods.description: Get the zone extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: face_areas
methods.description: Get the area of the faces of this zone.

methods.name: face_extra
methods.signature: face_extra ( face_index: int , extra_index: int ) → any.
methods.description: Get the value of the extra variable at the index extra_index associated with face_index. face_index starts at zero, extra_index starts at 1.

methods.name: face_find
methods.signature: face_find ( gp0 , gp1 , gp2 ) → int or None.
methods.description: Get the face index of the zone that contains the three gridpoints gp0, gp1 and gp2. Each gridpoint may be specified by a itasca.gridpoint.Gridpoint object or by ID number. If the face is found a value beteen 0 and 5 is returned. If no face is found, None is returned.

methods.name: face_find_normal
methods.description: Get the face index of the zone that has outward facing normal closest to the direction normal. This function returns a value from 0 to 5.

methods.name: face_group
methods.signature: face_group ( face_index: int , slot='Default' ) → str or None.
methods.description: Get the group name associated with the face identified by face_index in slot slot. face_index starts at zero. None is returned if no group is assigned to the given slot.

methods.name: face_group_remove
methods.signature: face_group_remove ( face_index: int , group_name: str ) → bool.
methods.description: Removes the group_name from the face identified and face_index. The return value will be false if that group had not been assigned to that face. It will remove the group name from any slot it is found in. face_index starts at zero.

methods.name: face_in_group
methods.signature: face_in_group ( face_index: int , group_name: str , slot='Default' ) → bool.
methods.description: Check if the group_name is associated with the zone face indicated by face_index. By default will check if there is a match in any slot, if the slot optional argument is specified it will return a match only in that slot. Note that this function will return a match if any zone attached to the face contains that group name, as well as the face itself. face_index starts at zero.

methods.name: face_normals
methods.description: Get the outward facing normal vector of all the faces of the zone.

methods.name: faces
methods.signature: faces ( ) → tuple of tuples of Gridpoint objects.
methods.description: Get a tuple of tuples containing the gridpoint objects for each face.

returns.type: tuple of tuples of Gridpoint objects.

methods.name: flow
methods.description: Get the zone specific discharge vector for the zone (vector).

methods.name: flow_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the zone specific discharge vector for the zone.

methods.name: flow_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the zone specific discharge vector for the zone.

methods.name: flow_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the zone specific discharge vector for the zone.

methods.name: fluid_model
methods.description: Get the fluid flow constitituve model for the zone.

methods.name: fluid_prop
methods.description: Get a fluid property value of this zone.

methods.name: fluid_props
methods.description: Return a dictionary containing the fluid properties.

methods.name: flux
methods.description: Get the zone zone average heat flux vector (vector).

methods.name: flux_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the zone zone average heat flux vector.

methods.name: flux_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the zone zone average heat flux vector.

methods.name: flux_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the zone zone average heat flux vector.

methods.name: geom_test
methods.description: Test the geometric fitness of a zone. Returns true if the zone is good, and false if the zone is bad.

methods.name: gridpoints
methods.description: Get a tuple the gridpoint objects which are part of this zone.

methods.name: group
methods.signature: group ( [ slot: str or int ] ) → str.
methods.description: Get the zone group name in a given slot.

methods.name: group_remove
methods.signature: group_remove ( group_name: str or int [ , slot: str or int ] ) → bool.
methods.description: Remove from the given group from all group slots of the zone. One argument of type string, giving the group name, is required. The return value is a bool which is True if the group was removed from any slot, otherwise False.

methods.name: groups
methods.description: Get a dictionary describing which groups this zone is part of. The keys of the dictionary are the slot names and the values are the group names.

methods.name: has_prop
methods.description: Returns True if the zone has the given surface property.

methods.name: hysteretic_props
methods.description: Get the hysteretic damping properties of this zone as a Python dictionary.

methods.name: id
methods.description: Get the zone id.

methods.name: in_group
methods.signature: in_group ( group_name: str or int [ , slot: str or int ] ) → bool.
methods.description: Test if the zone is part of a given group. If the optional argument slot is given, only that slot is searched. Otherwise, all group slots are searched.

methods.name: live
methods.description: Checks if the zone is live, meaning it has a non-null mechanical, thermal, or fluid constitutive model.

methods.name: model
methods.description: Get the zone the current zone mechanical constitutive model.

methods.name: model_init
methods.description: Initializes all constitutive models (mechanical, fluid, and thermal) assigned to the zone. This recalculates intermediate values based on the current properties. This may be necessary if property values are changed during cycling. Note that mechanical constitutive models should recalculate intermediate stored values automatically when properties change. This does not perform an update of values depending on stiffness or density, see the itasca.zone.force_update() function.

methods.name: num_gp
methods.description: Get the number of unique gridpoints associated with this type of zone. This can be as few as 4 for tetrahedral zones, or as many as 8 for hexahedral zones.

methods.name: ortho
methods.description: Get a measure of orthogonality for the zone. A value near zero indicates that the zone is very non-orthogonal.

methods.name: overlays
methods.description: Get the number of overlays available in the zone. This number will normally be 2. A value of 1 can occurr if the zone is deformed sufficiently to cause one overlay to contain a tetra with zero or negative volume, or if the zone was deliberately created with one overlay during the zone cmodel assign command. A value of 0 means the zone has never had a constitutive model assigned, and therefore internal tetra have never been created.

methods.name: planarity
methods.description: Get a measure of how planar the quadrilateral faces of a zone are. A value of 0 means that all faces are perfectly planar. The greater this number, the more nonplanar the faces are.

methods.name: plane_traction
methods.signature: plane_traction ( vdir: vec3 ) → (traction: vec, normal_stress: float, max_shear_stress: float, max_shear_stress_direction: vec3).
methods.description: Get the traction on the zone in the plane normal to vdir. The return value is a tuple which contains the traction(vec), normal stress(float), maximum shear stress(float) and maximum shear stress direction (vec).

returns.type: (traction: vec, normal_stress: float, max_shear_stress: float, max_shear_stress_direction: vec3).

methods.name: pos
methods.description: Get the zone centroid location (vector).

methods.name: pos_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the zone centroid location.

methods.name: pos_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the zone centroid location.

methods.name: pos_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the zone centroid location.

methods.name: pp
methods.description: Get the zone average zone pore pressure.

methods.name: prop
methods.description: Get a property value of this zone.

methods.name: props
methods.description: Return a dictionary containing the mechanical properties.

methods.name: rotation
methods.description: Get the zone rotational increment tensor. This is calculated using the current displacement field.

methods.name: rotation_rate
methods.description: Get the zone rotation rate tensor. This is calculated using the current velocity field.

methods.name: set_density
methods.description: Set the zone zone density.

methods.name: set_extra
methods.signature: set_extra ( slot: int , value: any ) → None.
methods.description: Set the zone extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: set_face_extra
methods.signature: set_face_extra ( face_index: int , extra_index: int , value: any ) → None.
methods.description: Set the value of the extra variable at the index extra_index associated with face_index. face_index starts at zero.

methods.name: set_face_group
methods.signature: set_face_group ( face_index: int , group_name: str , slot='Default' ) → None.
methods.description: Set the group name associated with the face identified by face_index in slot slot. face_index starts at zero.

methods.name: set_fluid_model
methods.description: Set the fluid flow constitituve model for the zone. The currently available constitutive models are anisotropic, isotropic, and null.

methods.name: set_fluid_prop
methods.description: Set a fluid property value of this zone.

methods.name: set_group
methods.signature: set_group ( group_name: str or int [ , slot: str or int ] ) → None.
methods.description: Set the zone group name in a given slot.

methods.name: set_model
methods.description: Set the zone the current zone mechanical constitutive model.

methods.name: set_pp
methods.description: Set the zone average zone pore pressure.

methods.name: set_prop
methods.signature: set_prop ( property_name: str , value: any ) → None.
methods.description: Set a surface property of this zone.

methods.name: set_state
methods.description: Set the current plasticity state indicators of this zone.

methods.name: set_stress
methods.description: Set the zone stress tensor.

methods.name: set_temp
methods.description: Set the zone temperature.

methods.name: set_therm_prop
methods.description: Set a thermal property value of this zone.

methods.name: set_thermal_model
methods.description: Set the thermal flow constitituve model for the zone. The currently available constitutive models are advection-conduction, anisotropic, hydration, isotropic, and null.

methods.name: set_work_elastic_shear
methods.description: Set the zone zone shear elastic work dissipated.

methods.name: set_work_elastic_vol
methods.description: Set the zone zone volumetric elastic work dissipated.

methods.name: set_work_plastic_shear
methods.description: Set the zone zone shear plastic work dissipated.

methods.name: set_work_plastic_vol
methods.description: Set the zone zone volumetric plastic work dissipated.

methods.name: state
methods.description: Get the current plasticity state indicators of this zone. The argument average, if true, indicates that the bit will be set if 50% or more of the volume averaged tetra have that bit set. If false then the bit will be set if any tetra in the zone have that bit set.

methods.name: strain
methods.description: Get the zone strain increment, based on the current displacement field.

methods.name: strain_rate
methods.description: Get the zone strain rate, based on the current velocity field.

methods.name: strain_shear_inc
methods.description: Get the zone shear strain increment, based on the current displacement field. This is the square root of the second invariant of the strain increment deviator.

methods.name: strain_shear_rate
methods.description: Get the zone shear strain rate, based on the current velocity field. This is the square root of the second invariant of the strain rate deviator.

methods.name: strain_vol_inc
methods.description: Get the zone volumetric strain increment, based on the current displacement field. This is the trace of the strain increment tensor.

methods.name: strain_vol_rate
methods.description: Get the zone volumetric strain rate, based on the current velocity field. This is the trace of the strain rate tensor.

methods.name: stress
methods.description: Get the zone stress tensor.

methods.name: stress_effective
methods.description: Get the zone effective stress. This is the volume weighted average of the tetra stresses, plus the zone averaged pore-pressure.

methods.name: stress_int
methods.description: Get the intermediate principal stress of the volume weighted average of the zone tetra stresses.

methods.name: stress_max
methods.description: Get the maximum (most positive) principal value of the volume averaged tetra stress. Note that compressive stresses are negative in FLAC3D.

methods.name: stress_min
methods.description: Get the minimum (most negative) principal value of the volume averaged tetra stress. Note that compressive stresses are negative in FLAC3D.

methods.name: stress_prin
methods.description: Get the zone zone principal stress, calculated from the volume weighted average of the tetra stresses (vector).

methods.name: stress_prin_dir
methods.description: Return a tuple containing the principle stress magnitudes as a vec and the principle stress directions as a tens3.

methods.name: stress_prin_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the zone zone principal stress, calculated from the volume weighted average of the tetra stresses.

methods.name: stress_prin_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the zone zone principal stress, calculated from the volume weighted average of the tetra stresses.

methods.name: stress_prin_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the zone zone principal stress, calculated from the volume weighted average of the tetra stresses.

methods.name: temp
methods.description: Get the zone temperature. Normally this is the average temperature of the gridpoints. If the zone thermal zone-based-temperature command was used, then temperatures are stored and retrieved directly from the zone.

methods.name: test_quality
methods.description: Get measures of the zone quality, or how the zone shape may affect solution accuracy. The first value indicates a test of volume over edge length. The second value indicates a test of skew. Both return the minimum value obtained over all internal tetrahedrons. A return value of 1.0 indicates an equilateral tetra.

methods.name: tet_strain_rates
methods.signature: tet_strain_rates ( ) → tuple of tuples of stens3.
methods.description: Get all the tet strain rate tensors. Returns two tuples of stens, one for each overlay.

methods.name: tet_strains
methods.signature: tet_strains ( ) → tuple of tuples of stens3.
methods.description: Get all the tet strain tensors. Returns two tuples of stens, one for each overlay.

methods.name: tet_stresses
methods.signature: tet_stresses ( ) → tuple of tuples of stens3.
methods.description: Get all the tet stress tensors. Returns two tuples of stens, one for each overlay.

methods.name: tet_volumes
methods.signature: tet_volumes ( ) → tuple of tuples of float.
methods.description: Get volume of each tet. Returns two tuples, one for each overlay. These values are zero before any cycling has occured.

methods.name: tets
methods.signature: tets ( ) → tuple of tuples of tuples of itasca.
methods.description: gridpoint.Gridpoint objects. Get the gridpoints which make of each tet. Returns two tuples, one for each overlay.

returns.type: tuple of tuples of tuples of itasca.

methods.name: therm_prop
methods.description: Get a thermal property value of this zone.

methods.name: therm_props
methods.description: Return a dictionary containing the thermal properties.

methods.name: thermal_model
methods.description: Get the thermal flow constitituve model for the zone.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Get the zone type, one of: “brick”, “wedge”, “pyramid”, “dbrick” or “tetra”).

methods.name: valid
methods.description: Returns True if this zone is live.

methods.name: vol
methods.description: Get the zone volume calculated using the current position of the zone’s gridpoints.

methods.name: vol_deformed
methods.description: Get the volume of a zone using gridpoint positions that take into account accumulated gridpoint displacements. This method is meant to be used in a small-strain analysis when deformed zone volumes are required. This method should not be used in a large-strain analysis (an incorrect volume will be returned). Use the .vol() of the zone object in large-strain mode.

methods.name: work_elastic_shear
methods.description: Get the zone zone shear elastic work dissipated.

methods.name: work_elastic_total
methods.description: Get the total elastic work.

methods.name: work_elastic_vol
methods.description: Get the zone zone volumetric elastic work dissipated.

methods.name: work_plastic_shear
methods.description: Get the zone zone shear plastic work dissipated.

methods.name: work_plastic_total
methods.description: Get the total plastic work dissipated.

methods.name: work_plastic_vol
methods.description: Get the zone zone volumetric plastic work dissipated.
